name: Veggie Burger Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 package Dry soup mix or Salad dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until the mixture is smooth and reduced to a fine powder.
3. Transfer the powdered mixture to a container for storage.
4. To use, mix 1 cup of the dry mix with 2/3 cup of hot water or a combination of water and BBQ sauce, water and wine, or any other liquid you prefer.
5. Let the mixture sit for 15 minutes.
6. Form into 3 patties.
7. Cook the patties in a pan coated with nonstick spray.
NOTE: If using BBQ sauce as part of the liquid, the patties will brown faster due to the sugar content in the sauce.
This recipe makes 4 cups of dry mix. The variations for this are endless; you can use different dry mixes such as Good Seasons fat-free dry salad dressing mix and various flavors of soup mix (e.g., onion soup). You can also use dry seasoning mixes like taco seasoning, etc. Some mixes may be high in sodium, but the overall level should average out to an acceptable level when using a quantity of mix.
